channel.title: Posts on WUCHAOXIN'S BLOG
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on WUCHAOXIN'S BLOG

item.title: Docker_basics
item.description: Docker入门 Docker是采用写实复制的模式，如果想修改一个文件，会先从读写层下面的只读层复制到读写层，该文件的只读版本仍然存在，但是已

item.title: Redis_basics
item.description: Redis ![image-20201109173525679](/Users/didi/Library/Application Support/typora-user-images/image-20201109173525679.png) Stirng GET SET DEL List LPUSH RPUSH LPOP RPOP LINDEX LRANGE lrange 0 -1 //从左往右便利全部列表 SET SADD SREM SISMEMBER SMEMBER HASH HSET HGET HGETALL HDEL ZSET ZADD ZRANGE ZRANGEBYSCORE ZREM
